Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: He doesn't elaborate on that. Instead, he just smirks and takes another bite out of his meal.
I see the issue here. Let me introduce myself proper.

Entries.Name: Quebec Kweebec
Entries.Line: Bonjour, I'm Québec Kweebec. « French » Kweebec's twin brother.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: He takes a deep, dramatic bow that accentuates the fuzz on his chest, and sends a chunk of cheese flying to the side. Maybe he should've considered putting the fork down beforehand.

Line.Text: It takes him a moment to assume his previous pose again, though his slouch has somehow increased tenfold. His legs cross in a manner that perfectly compliments his rather relaxed state of dress.

Choices.Text: Well, you're the hotter one for sure.
